content_markdown: The rate of global warming might be reduced by

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram present in the question.

options.label: A
options.text: replacing the use of coal and oil with natural gas.

options.label: B
options.text: a reduction in the Earth’s albedo.

vibe_explanation: Global warming is primarily driven by the emission of greenhouse gases like $CO_2$. Natural gas produces less $CO_2$ per unit of energy released compared to coal and oil, thus potentially reducing the rate of warming. Conversely, reducing albedo (more absorption), reducing carbon fixation (less $CO_2$ removal), or increasing deforestation (less $CO_2$ removal) would all accelerate global warming.
